\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Layered background Green\textquotesingle{}s function with tabulation and D/\+K/delta/kappa integrals. 

A high-\/level facade around Sommerfeld-\/integral evaluation for layered media. It owns\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Per-\/layer wavenumbers {\ttfamily k\+\_\+L} (from \doxylink{classGreenF}{GreenF} base class).
\item Medium parameters {\ttfamily epsilon}, {\ttfamily mu} and interface depths {\ttfamily z\+Vals\+Interfaces} with derived {\ttfamily thickness}.
\item Precomputed coefficient tables for different interaction types\+: intra-\/layer (top/bottom vs internal) and inter-\/layer.
\item Interpolation grids (r, z1\mbox{[}, z2\mbox{]}) per interaction group, chosen from mesh-\/based ranges (triangle barycenters / quadrature points).
\end{DoxyItemize}

The class exposes pointwise kernels (scalar/grad/dyadic) and assembly helpers (Same\+Tri\+DK, Same\+Tri\+Delta\+Kappa) used by \doxylink{classSIEFormPMCHW}{SIEForm\+PMCHW}. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFLayered3D_8h_source_l00058}{58}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFLayered3D_8h_source}{Green\+FLayered3\+D.\+h}}.

Evaluate Green\textquotesingle{}s-\/function components for {\bfseries{inter-\/layer}} interactions by interpolating the smooth (Sommerfeld) coefficient volume. 

Uses the 3D tables built for pairs of distinct layers; indices and table keys must match those produced in {\ttfamily Fill\+Green\+FTable}. 
\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em R} & In-\/plane radial separation $\rho$ between source and observation. \\
\hline
{\em Z1} & Vertical distance z inter-\/layer interaction (definition can be found in {\ttfamily cartesian\+To\+Layered\+Tab()} of {\ttfamily \doxylink{classLayeredMediaUtils}{Layered\+Media\+Utils}}). \\
\hline
{\em Z2} & Vertical distance z\textquotesingle{} inter-\/layer (definition can be found in {\ttfamily cartesian\+To\+Layered\+Tab()} of {\ttfamily \doxylink{classLayeredMediaUtils}{Layered\+Media\+Utils}}). \\
\hline
{\em coeff\+Index} & Index selecting which interpolation coefficients to use. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
std\+::map from component name to complex value at (R, Z1, Z2). The key set follows the tabulation. 
\end{DoxyReturn}
\begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
Queries are clamped to the volume bounds; linear blending may be used along sparse axes depending on grid density. 
\end{DoxyNote}

Evaluate Green\textquotesingle{}s function components for {\bfseries{intra-\/layer}} interactions by interpolating the smooth (Sommerfeld) coefficient tables. 

Interpolates pretabulated complex coefficients on the (R, Z1, Z2) grid built during {\ttfamily Fill\+Green\+FTable} for the requested bucket. 
\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em interaction\+Type} & Identifier for the intra-\/layer type. Must match the key used at tabulation time. \\
\hline
{\em R} & In-\/plane radial separation $\rho$ between source and observation. \\
\hline
{\em Z1} & Vertical distance z+z\textquotesingle{} for half-\/space intra-\/layer interactions or z-\/z\textquotesingle{} for inner intra-\/layer interactions (the different definitions, can be found in {\ttfamily cartesian\+To\+Layered\+Tab()} of {\ttfamily \doxylink{classLayeredMediaUtils}{Layered\+Media\+Utils}}). \\
\hline
{\em Z2} & Vertical distance z+z\textquotesingle{} inner intra-\/layer (the definition can be found in {\ttfamily cartesian\+To\+Layered\+Tab()} of {\ttfamily \doxylink{classLayeredMediaUtils}{Layered\+Media\+Utils}}). \\
\hline
{\em coeff\+Index} & Index selecting which interpolation coefficients to use. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
std\+::map from component name to complex value at (R, Z1, Z2). The key set follows the tabulation. 
\end{DoxyReturn}
\begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
Queries are clamped to the grid box; outside-\/range inputs fall back to boundary interpolation. 
\end{DoxyNote}
